name: claude-code-empowerments
description: A personal marketplace of Claude Code plugins and skills — empowerments for everyday coding.

plugins.name: bake-to-completion
plugins.description: Interview-driven skill that takes a half-baked software/product idea and strengthens every aspect of it, then hands off a clean brief to design and planning.

plugins.name: anvil
plugins.description: Native effectiveness evals & improvement loop for Claude Code skills, subagents & plugins — generate balanced test data, run in-session A/B trials on your subscription, score activation / quality-delta / cost with confidence intervals, and propose improvements.

plugins.name: design-taste-frontend
plugins.description: Anti-slop frontend skill for landing pages, portfolios, and redesigns — reads the brief, infers a design direction, reaches for real design systems, and runs a strict pre-flight check against AI-design tells. Vendored with attribution from Leonxlnx/taste-skill (MIT).

plugins.name: workflow-forge
plugins.description: Bootstraps a project-tailored CLAUDE.md plus TDD, iterative review, a pre-commit test gate, symmetric-surface audits, capability sync, and TODO/WORKLOG tracking into any repo. Detects stack and OS to adapt.

plugins.name: skill-installer
plugins.description: Browse a bundled catalog of team skills and selectively install them into your user-global or current-project skills directory.

plugins.name: skill-foundry
plugins.description: Authors a new skill, subagent, or plugin to this marketplace's house conventions and registers it (plugin.json, marketplace.json, README, CHANGELOG), then hands off to Anvil for evaluation. The seam between a validated idea and a measured, registered skill.

plugins.name: proofmark
plugins.description: The pre-ship proof for Claude Code artifacts. Static-scan a skill, subagent, command, plugin, or the whole marketplace for trigger quality, progressive disclosure, anti-slop prose, plugin.json and marketplace.json consistency, LF-on-.sh, and claude plugin validate, then render a verdict per finding with judgment. The cheap static gate before Anvil's expensive dynamic eval.

plugins.name: idea-forge
plugins.description: Hardens one clarified, high-stakes idea by making eight rival variants of it fight an adversarial king-of-the-hill ladder, grafting each challenger's strongest compatible fix into a running merge, and shipping a result provably no worse than the best original plus a full transcript. The depth-on-one companion to bake-to-completion's clarify pass.

plugins.name: forgemaster
plugins.description: The top of the toolchain: hand it one rough idea and it drives the whole development process — intake, adversarial hardening via idea-forge, spec, tests-first build via subagent-driven development, and enforced quality gates — leaving a resumable artifact at every stage and refusing to mark the run done until every gate has observed evidence.

plugins.name: crucible
plugins.description: One rough idea in, assayed code out. Drives the whole development process through seven resumable stages — intake, adversarial divergence, spec, tests-first, subagent build, and an evidence-ledger assay — with hooks that refuse to let a run finish until every quality gate has proof on disk. Slop is dross; the gates skim it.
